center.name: Fuerte Esperanza
center.summary: Fuerte Esperanza是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Mississippi kite，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This Mississippi kite migrates to subtropical and temperate regions of South America for the winter, mostly to northern Argentina and southern Brazil. They are also known from Belize, Costa Rica, El Salvador, México, and Panamá. Migration normally occurs in groups of 20 to 30 birds. However, there are exceptions, as mixed flocks may occur; groups of up to 10,000 birds at one time may be observed, such as at Fuerte Esperanza, Argentina
